message:
Update documentation for new changelog system

- Add "Generated Content" section to CLAUDE.md
- Rewrite "Auto-Generated Files" section in documentation guide
- Remove references to deleted update.yaml workflow
- Clarify that link checking runs separately in CI

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -65,12 +65,19 @@ import ParsingOptions from '@partials/operators/ParsingOptions.mdx';
 - Use `pnpm build` only when you need to inspect build artifacts. Output goes
   to `/build`.
 
+### Generated Content
+
+Some content is auto-generated and excluded from linting:
+
+- **Changelog**: Run `pnpm sync:changelog` to fetch from `tenzir/news` repo.
+  Generated files: `src/content/docs/changelog/`, `src/sidebar-changelog.ts`.
+- **Reference docs**: Run `pnpm generate:reference` for function/operator docs.
+
 ### Linting
 
-- Run `pnpm lint` to execute every linter, including markdownlint, ESLint,
-  Prettier, and the link checker.
-- Run `pnpm lint:fix` to apply automatic fixes across all linters before you
-  commit.
+- Run `pnpm lint` to check markdownlint, ESLint, and Prettier.
+- Run `pnpm lint:fix` to apply automatic fixes across all linters.
+- Link checking runs separately in CI via `pnpm build:linkcheck`.
 
 ### Reviewing Pull Requests

@@ -169,58 +169,44 @@ svgo image.svg
 This automatically rewrites the file in-place with redundant code removed and
 optimized structure.
 
-## Auto-Updated Files
+## Auto-Generated Files
 
-**Important**: Some files in this repository are automatically updated by CI and
+**Important**: Some files in this repository are automatically generated and
 should **never** be manually edited. Manual changes to these files will be
-overwritten the next time the [update
-workflow](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/blob/main/.github/workflows/update.yaml)
-runs.
+overwritten.
 
-### Automatically Updated Files
+### Generated Files
 
-The following files are synchronized from upstream repositories:
+**Changelog** (generated at build time by `pnpm sync:changelog`):
 
-**Changelog:**
+- `src/content/docs/changelog/` — release notes from
+  [tenzir/news](https://github.com/tenzir/news)
+- `src/sidebar-changelog.ts` — sidebar configuration for changelog pages
 
-- `src/content/docs/changelog/` is generated by `scripts/sync-changelog.mjs`
-  from the [tenzir/news](https://github.com/tenzir/news) repository
+**Reference Documentation** (synced from upstream repositories):
 
-**Tenzir Node Documentation:**
-
-- `src/content/docs/reference/functions` is synced from
+- `src/content/docs/reference/functions/` — from
   [tenzir/tenzir](https://github.com/tenzir/tenzir) at `docs/functions/`
-- `src/content/docs/reference/operators` is synced from
+- `src/content/docs/reference/operators/` — from
   [tenzir/tenzir](https://github.com/tenzir/tenzir) at `docs/operators/`
-- `src/content/docs/reference/functions.mdx` is generated from individual
-  function files
-- `src/content/docs/reference/operators.mdx` is generated from individual
-  operator files
-- `src/content/apis/openapi.node.yaml` is the API specification for Tenzir Node
-  and generated from the node's source code
-- `tenzir.yaml.example` is the node's example configuration file
-
-**Tenzir Platform Documentation:**
-
-- `src/content/docs/changelog/platform` is generated from individual changelog
-  entries
-- `src/content/docs/reference/platform-cli.mdx` is synced from
+- `src/content/docs/reference/functions.mdx` — generated index of functions
+- `src/content/docs/reference/operators.mdx` — generated index of operators
+- `src/content/docs/reference/platform-cli.mdx` — from
   [tenzir/platform](https://github.com/tenzir/platform) at `docs/platform-cli.mdx`
+- `src/content/apis/openapi.node.yaml` — API specification for Tenzir Node
+- `tenzir.yaml.example` — example configuration file
 
-### Making Changes to Auto-Updated Content
+### Making Changes to Generated Content
 
 If you need to update content in these files:
 
-1. **For Functions/Operators**: Make changes in the
+1. **Changelog**: Make changes in the
+   [tenzir/news](https://github.com/tenzir/news) repository
+2. **Functions/Operators**: Make changes in the
    [tenzir/tenzir](https://github.com/tenzir/tenzir) repository
-2. **For Platform CLI**: Make changes in the
+3. **Platform CLI**: Make changes in the
    [tenzir/platform](https://github.com/tenzir/platform) repository
-3. **For generation logic**: Modify the scripts in `scripts/` or the update
-   workflow
-
-Our CI will automatically prevent pull requests that modify auto-updated files.
-If you encounter this error, revert your changes and make them in the
-appropriate upstream repository instead.
+4. **Generation logic**: Modify the scripts in `scripts/`
